unified_frame_statement: Marcus shares his breakthrough moment with Coach Elena, showing how reframing success helped him overcome burnout panic attacks and achieve peaceful productivity.

state_alpha.sensory_anchor: The tightness in his chest during executive meetings

the_abyss.realization: "The armor was suffocating me, not protecting me."

the_spark.insight_quote: "She looked at me and said 'Daddy, why are you always tired?' and I broke." (14:45)

state_omega.action: Daily presence practice before family time
state_omega.result: Panic attacks from weekly to 0 in 8 weeks

sensory_anchors: The hum of the projector fan during the panic
The cold bathroom tile when he broke down
The warmth of his daughter's hand in his now
